name: file-sync-lambda
description: Lambda function to sync S3 events to FileObject DB records

scripts.bundle: ../../node_modules/.bin/esbuild index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node20 --outfile=dist_esbuild/index.js --external:@aws-sdk/client-s3 --external:@aws-sdk/client-sts --external:pg --external:@prisma/adapter-pg --tsconfig=tsconfig.json "--define:import.meta.url=__filename" && sed -i 's|(0, import_node_url.fileURLToPath)(__filename)|__filename|g' dist_esbuild/index.js && cp -rL node_modules dist_esbuild/ && rm -rf dist_esbuild/node_modules/@prisma/studio-core dist_esbuild/node_modules/@prisma/engines dist_esbuild/node_modules/@prisma/fetch-engine dist_esbuild/node_modules/@prisma/get-platform dist_esbuild/node_modules/@prisma/dev dist_esbuild/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/query_compiler_fast* dist_esbuild/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/query_compiler_small* dist_esbuild/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/wasm-compiler* dist_esbuild/node_modules/prisma dist_esbuild/node_modules/typescript dist_esbuild/node_modules/@electric-sql && cd dist_esbuild && zip -r ../function.zip . && cd .. && rm -rf dist_esbuild
